item.title:

item.description:
Which matters most?
1) Token usage 2) Dictation word count 3) Total AI queries 4) Tool count
(Number 2 is becoming more and more of a positive indicator in my book, although I'm disappointed I broke my streak. Gotta beat 47!) https://t.co/B0hHFR8D7t
